PF2ERB.Title: Rules Browser
PF2ERB.SharedNotification: Shared with the table in chat.
PF2ERB.PaletteHint: Go to… (a rule, feat, spell name…)
PF2ERB.Folder.Prompt: Type a folder name (or pick an existing one). Leave it blank to remove it from any folder.
PF2ERB.Settings.RememberSession.Name: Remember tab session
PF2ERB.Settings.RememberSession.Hint: Saves your tabs and histories and restores them when reopening the browser, even after reloading Foundry.
PF2ERB.PickFromSidebar: Pick a document from the sidebar.
PF2ERB.BuildingIndex: Building the full-text index… (first time only)
PF2ERB.NotFound: That document could not be resolved.
PF2ERB.Unsupported: This content type cannot be displayed here yet. Use the corner button to open it in its own window.
PF2ERB.Welcome.Line1: Browse the compendia in the sidebar or use the search box. Rule links will open right here — no new windows.
PF2ERB.Welcome.Line2: Use back/forward like in a web browser. The corner button on any document opens its native sheet when you need it.
PF2ERB.Settings.WorldJournals.Name: Include world journals
PF2ERB.Settings.WorldJournals.Hint: Adds the current world's journals to navigation and search.
PF2ERB.Settings.ItemPacks.Name: Search system item compendia
PF2ERB.Settings.ItemPacks.Hint: Includes system feats, spells, actions, conditions, etc. in title search.
PF2ERB.Keybind.Open.Name: Open the Rules Browser
PF2ERB.Keybind.Open.Hint: Opens (or focuses) the Rules Browser window.
PF2ERB.Keybind.Palette.Name: Go to... (command palette)
PF2ERB.Keybind.Palette.Hint: Opens a quick-jump search box to go straight to any document without using the sidebar. Only works while the Rules Browser is open.
PF2ERB.Keybind.NewTab.Name: New tab
PF2ERB.Keybind.NewTab.Hint: Opens a new tab in the Rules Browser.
PF2ERB.Keybind.CloseTab.Name: Close tab
PF2ERB.Keybind.CloseTab.Hint: Closes the active tab in the Rules Browser (pinned tabs are skipped).
PF2ERB.Keybind.Back.Name: Back
PF2ERB.Keybind.Back.Hint: Steps back in the active tab's history.
PF2ERB.Keybind.Forward.Name: Forward
PF2ERB.Keybind.Forward.Hint: Steps forward in the active tab's history.
PF2ERB.Keybind.FocusSearch.Name: Focus search
PF2ERB.Keybind.FocusSearch.Hint: Focuses the Rules Browser sidebar's search box.
